race.description: Just Energy We Take Care Of Your Solar Needs Mdn Plate
race.comment: This race has taken a hit by scratchings and it leaves REIGN CAPITAL (7) on top. He resumes having run seventh on debut at Geelong nearly a year ago, then with the Price & Kent Jnr yard. Now with Nick Ryan, he looks to have trialled nicely, respect any push from the sharp yard. INTERROGATE (3) has placed in 3/4 runs to date, just finding one better at Ballarat last time out over this trip. Tough draw but he should be rattling home. SHALAAKEI (8) put in the best effort of his career last time when stepping up to 1500m, coming home nicely to grab second at Mornington. Back 100m here but gets a nice draw for Nolen who can prove hard to hold out. FYRELINE (2) makes his Australian debut for the Ciaron Maher yard, late betting will be the key with him.
